scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:export

vitest.example_test: src/store/task-reducer.test.ts — imports {describe,it,expect} from 'vitest'; uses describe()/it() blocks with plain factory helpers (emptyState(), sampleTask()); no beforeEach lifecycle; assertions via expect().toEqual/toBe/toBeNull/toHaveCount.

playwright.describe_serial_pattern: Each spec uses exactly one describe.serial('X setup') block for the ordered setup chain (auth→group→invite), then sibling non-serial describes for independent assertion tests.

key_specs.description: TP-01/10/11/20: canonical two-party setup (auth, invite, group visible, task create+move)
TP-90/91: LWW merge on concurrent task edits
TP-50/51/53: per-leaf removal semantics across distinct npubs
TP-40/41: leave-group as active member + re-invite
TP-31/32: NIP-44 task-snapshot at invite time captures merged history
Relay wire format contract via NDK subscriber

makefile.test_target_lines:
test: node_modules
	npm test

e2e: node_modules
	@$(MAKE) e2e-up; exit_code=0; npx playwright test || exit_code=$$?; $(MAKE) e2e-down; exit $$exit_code
makefile.add_property_test_note: test-property target slots cleanly between 'test' and 'e2e'. Pattern: 'test-property: node_modules\n\tFAST_CHECK_NUM_RUNS=10000 npx vitest run src/store/task-reducer.property.test.ts src/store/multi-client.property.test.ts'.

e2e_fixtures_summary: two-party.ts (DSL verbs — single source of truth for all 15 actions)

dsl_verbs.note: No standalone e2e/helpers/ dir. All DSL helpers in e2e/fixtures/two-party.ts.

two_party_test_pattern.quiescence_pattern: settle(page, ms) helper wrapping waitForTimeout: 3000ms after bunker auth (key-package propagation), 5000ms after reload (device-sync re-fetch). Live assertions use expect(locator).toContainText/toHaveCount with 15000–60000ms timeouts. No expect.poll usage.

conventions.test_naming: Unit: src/**/*.test.ts. E2E: e2e/tests/*.spec.ts. describe() label is 'verb-noun' or scenario DSL. it() labels use plain English describing observable outcome.
conventions.import_style: Named imports only. Vitest: import {describe,it,expect} from 'vitest'. Playwright: import {test,expect} from '@playwright/test'. DSL helpers imported with .js extension (ESM bundler resolution).
conventions.no_test_globals: vitest config has globals:false — must explicitly import.
